content: AsyncPostgresSaver.from_conn_string() uses prepare_threshold=0 (NOT None), which is NOT safe for Supabase Supavisor transaction pooler. Official Supabase docs recommend prepare_threshold=None for psycopg3 with transaction pooler. The safe pattern: create AsyncConnectionPool with kwargs={prepare_threshold:None, autocommit:True, row_factory:dict_row} then pass pool directly to AsyncPostgresSaver(conn=pool). Also set checkpointer.supports_pipeline=False to force conn.transaction() instead of conn.pipeline() which is unreliable on Supavisor transaction pooler.
